modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: OneDrive and SharePoint sign-in error on Windows 10.

full_description_text: So, the user was trying to access OneDrive but got this message saying another account is already signed in. They mentioned that when they tried to open a file from SharePoint, it asked them to sign in and then just gave an error. It’s really frustrating because they can’t email anything from OneDrive right now.
short_description: OneDrive and SharePoint sign-in error on Windows 10.
description: So, the user was trying to access OneDrive but got this message saying another account is already signed in. They mentioned that when they tried to open a file from SharePoint, it asked them to sign in and then just gave an error. It’s really frustrating because they can’t email anything from OneDrive right now.
